patch.value: The package correctly uses the official @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk import, but package.json only had @unbrained/pm-cli in peerDependencies and devDependencies. A clean pm install npm:pm-changelog reported extension_load_failed_sdk_dependency_missing:pm-changelog and did not expose pm changelog generate.
Published npm package missed runtime pm SDK dependency

Clean pm install npm:pm-changelog for v2026.05.24 failed to load the extension because @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk was not available inside the installed package runtime after switching to direct official SDK imports.

- package.json declares @unbrained/pm-cli as a runtime dependency for the extension.
- package-lock.json is updated.
- Local release checks pass.
- Corrective release v2026.05.24-1 is published.
- Clean pm install npm:pm-changelog exposes pm changelog generate and generates a smoke changelog.
Clean temporary pm consumer installing npm:pm-changelog@2026.5.24
Run pm init, pm install npm:pm-changelog --project, then pm changelog generate in a clean temporary directory.
The installed extension loads through the official SDK and exposes pm changelog generate.
pm package doctor reported extension_load_failed_sdk_dependency_missing:pm-changelog and pm changelog generate was unknown.

value.author: codex
value.text: Detected during the required clean published npm install verification after v2026.05.24.

value.author: codex
value.text: Fix with official SDK dependency metadata,not a local shim.

value.author: codex
value.text: Direct SDK imports require the SDK package to be present in the published extension runtime dependency graph.

value.author: codex
value.text: Local package install proved the official SDK dependency is now available without a custom shim.

patch.value: package.json now declares @unbrained/pm-cli under dependencies and package-lock.json is updated. npm run release:check passed with 18 tests and zero production vulnerabilities. Clean local pm install /tmp/pm-changelog-v2026-05-24-1-local-YR2JwY loaded the extension with activation ok=1 and generated a smoke changelog with one item.
Added @unbrained/pm-cli as a runtime dependency so the official @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk import is available when the package is installed as a pm extension.
Runtime SDK dependency fixed and locally verified
